subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Feb. 1920
subcodes.first_line: The beloved ones await, day after day, a fresh epistle that shall reach them from Me, that they may peruse it upon its arrival and place it within their treasured boxes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: احبا هر روز در انتظار نامه جدیدی هستند که از من به آنها برسد و پس از وصول بخوانند و در جعبه های خود بگذارند
subcodes.subjects: @words vs deeds, @entry by troops, @growth of the Cause, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
